highlights.headline: Michigan wins thriller over Wisconsin to advance to Big Ten final
highlights.description: Yaxel Lendeborg hits the game-winning 3-pointer and Michigan advances to the Big Ten tournament final.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCB Highlight (Michigan wins thriller over Wisconsin to advance to Big Ten final) 2026/03/14 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Yaxel Lendeborg made a tiebreaking 3-pointer with 0.4 seconds remaining, and No. 3 Michigan beat Nick Boyd and No. 23 Wisconsin 68-65 on Saturday to advance to the Big Ten Tournament championship.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lendeborg makes a tiebreaking 3 as No. 3 Michigan tops No. 23 Wisconsin 68-65 in Big Ten semis

headlines.description: — Tyler Tanner scored 20 points as No. 22 Vanderbilt beat fourth-ranked Florida 91-74 on Saturday, ending the defending national champion's bid to win a second straight Southeastern...

events.name: UConn Huskies at St. John's Red Storm

headlines.description: — With another St. John's championship salted away, Zuby Ejiofor walked slowly to the sideline with seconds remaining, tears trickling down the senior forward's face as he lowered his 6-foot-9 frame for multiple hugs.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ejiofor leads No. 13 St. John's to 72-52 rout of No. 6 UConn for 2nd straight Big East tourney title
